unified-device.description: Unified Device MCP - 59+ tools: device HW, control, comms, calendar, tasks, apps, shell, RAG, vault, RLM

tier1-device.description: Tier 1 Device API - 24 tools wrapping Kotlin device APIs (battery, wifi, SMS, calendar, sensors, etc.) via localhost:5563

tier2-system.description: Tier 2 System API - 14 tools wrapping Python system APIs (shell, files, packages, cron, proc) via localhost:5564

shell.description: Shell MCP - 5 tools: shell_exec, grep_search, find_files, list_directory, read_file

tasker.description: Tasker MCP - 23 dynamically-loaded Tasker automation tools via localhost:5563/tasker/run

rag-memory.description: RAG Memory MCP - search, add, health + semantic trigger tools (add/list/delete/search) via localhost:5562

camera.description: Camera MCP - 1 tool: take_photo with configurable camera_id

secure-vault.description: Secure Vault MCP - 4 tools: vault_store, vault_get, vault_list, vault_delete (encrypted secrets)

agenda.description: Agenda MCP - 14 tools: goals, intentions, behaviors CRUD + session logging + context retrieval (port convention: 5567)
